title: Ethiopian Lentil Stew
description: A flavorful and nutritious stew originating from Ethiopia, made with red lentils and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for an additional minute.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the berbere spice and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the lentils and 4 cups of water to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 30-40 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Season the stew with salt to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
